_comment: Real on-chain Uniswap txs (Dune-sourced, retargeted from uniswap-real-tx/corpus.json) routed through the v3 ActionBody decoder. expect annotated from observed harness output.

transactions.source: hand-encoded from Uniswap V2 Router02 verified ABI; selector surfaced by v2-router-02-mainnet coverage

transactions._note: Fixed 2026-05-31: UR V4 nested decode handles V4Router single-struct params, ABI alternatives, PoolKey pool_id/hooks, and UR Permit2 tuple paths.
Permit2 permitBatch calldata named-tuple over positional decode; fixed to pass after numeric tuple paths + time deserialization.
Permit2 permitSingle [0x2b67b570] — numeric tuple paths + Time str-or-num deser (2026-05-30). Flipped error->pass.

transactions.intent: Permit2.lockdown(TokenSpenderPair[]) — revokes allowances, safety direction (out of scope per AUDIT_UNISWAP_PHASE7B.md §2.3)

transactions.source: hand-encoded from Permit2 surface ABI; bitmap nonce revocation

transactions.intent: swapExactTokensForTokens (L2 Base spot-check — per-chain V2 Router02 address)
execute(bytes,bytes[],uint256) (L2 Base spot-check — per-chain UR address)
transactions._note: Fixed 2026-05-31: UR V4 nested decode handles V4Router single-struct params, ABI alternatives, PoolKey pool_id/hooks, and UR Permit2 tuple paths.

transactions.intent: swapExactTokensForTokens (L2 Arbitrum spot-check — per-chain V2 Router02 address)
mint (L2 Arbitrum spot-check — per-chain NFPM address)

transactions._note: SwapRouter02 exactInputSingle [0x04e45aaf] — v2->v3 port, single-tuple flatten + complete swap live_inputs (2026-05-30). Flipped error->pass.
SwapRouter02 multicall(deadline,bytes[]) [0x5ae401dc] — inner exactInputSingle now mapped, multicall_recurse flattens (2026-05-30). Flipped error->pass.
Manifest nfpm/multicall.json (multicall_recurse) authored, absent from index. DOMINANT NFPM batched-write path (25/80). Flip after rebuild + inner-selector index.
Covered by uniswap/v4-pool-manager/initialize@1.0.0 as ActionBody::Unknown. No first-class initialize-pool AMM body exists yet, so routing is explicit and conservative rather than a mapper miss.
NO MANIFEST for PosM 0xbd21 (nfpm/multicall.json targets NFPM 0xc364). New: position-manager multicall(bytes[]) multicall_recurse over inner modifyLiquidities 0xdd46508f. 18/80.
No direct Permit2 transferFrom batch manifest yet; expected mapper miss until Permit2 SignatureTransfer/AllowanceTransfer direct transfer surfaces are modelled.
V2 fee-on-transfer swap — manifest added 2026-05-30 (selector 0xb6f9de95); flipped error->pass after build-index
V2 fee-on-transfer swap — manifest added 2026-05-30 (selector 0x791ac947); flipped error->pass after build-index
Fixed 2026-05-31: UR V4 nested decode handles V4Router single-struct params, ABI alternatives, PoolKey pool_id/hooks, and UR Permit2 tuple paths.
